name: Cream Cheese Brownies#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and 3 tablespoons butter in a microwave or over very low heat, stirring constantly.
2. Blend the remaining butter with cheese until softened.
3. Gradually add 1/4 cup of sugar, beating well.
4. Blend in one egg, 1 tablespoon flour, and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla. Set aside.
5. Beat the remaining 2 eggs until creamy and thickened in color.
6. Gradually beat in the remaining 3/4 cup sugar, beating until thickened.
7. Add baking powder, salt, and 1/2 cup flour.
8. Blend in the cooled chocolate mixture, nuts, and 1 teaspoon vanilla.
9. Spread half of the chocolate batter in a greased 8 or 9-inch pan.
10. Add cheese mixture, spreading evenly.
11. Top with tablespoon fulls of remaining chocolate batter.
12. Zigzag a spatula through batter to marble it.
13. Bake in a 350°F oven for 35-40 minutes, or until the top springs back when lightly pressed in the center.
14. Cool and cut into squares.
